beforeImplementing: Check if real person is already in 'realPeopleCovered' array
Check if specific concept is already in 'specificConceptsCovered' array
Check 'themeSaturation' - if theme has 3+ stories, consider different theme for variety
If person/concept exists, pick different story
Update this file after implementing new story
varietyGoals: No more than 3 stories per theme before expanding to other themes
Avoid near-duplicate concepts (e.g., 2 stories about blind musicians)
Aim for diverse representation across themes
